Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const a=r.audits['color-contrast']; if\(a && a.details && a.details.items\) { console.log\('Color-contrast offenders:'\); a.details.items.slice\(0,5\).forEach\(i=>console.log\('  -', JSON.stringify\({selector: i.node?.selector, snippet: i.node?.snippet?.slice\(0,140\), explanation: i.node?.explanation}\)\)\); } }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); const a=r.audits['color-contrast']; if\(a && a.details && a.details.items\) { console.log\('Total contrast issues:', a.details.items.length\); a.details.items.slice\(0,8\).forEach\(i=>console.log\('  -', i.node?.selector, '|', i.node?.explanation?.slice\(0,200\)\)\); } else { console.log\('No contrast issues.'\); } }\);")
